user.title: Connect to iSolarCloud
user.description: Enter the credentials of your iSolarCloud developer application and account. Create an application on the Sungrow developer portal (developer-api.isolarcloud.com) to obtain the app key and secret key.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with iSolarCloud
reauth_confirm.description: Your iSolarCloud credentials are no longer valid. Enter them again.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the app key, secret key, username and password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to iSolarCloud or the plant ID is not accessible with this account.

data_description.scan_interval: iSolarCloud refreshes cloud data about every 5 minutes; polling faster returns the same values.
data_description.enable_control: Creates entities that WRITE settings to your inverter (charge/discharge command and power, SOC limits, forced charging schedule). Leave off unless you want Home Assistant to control the system.
